hero.subtitle: Check in 30 seconds if it's a fraud attempt. Free, anonymous, no account needed.

how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.step1_desc: Copy the suspicious text from SMS, WhatsApp or email and paste it into the form.
how_it_works.step2_desc: The AI model checks the text against the database of known fraud patterns.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Find out instantly if it's phishing and get exact steps on what to do.

alerts.title: Active phishing campaigns
alerts.load_error: The alert could not be loaded.

about.title: About ai-grija.ro
about.p1: ai-grija.ro is a free civic project developed by Zen Labs. Our goal is to help Romanian citizens identify phishing messages and protect themselves from online fraud.
about.p2: The platform uses artificial intelligence to analyze suspicious messages and provide clear action recommendations.
about.flow_step1_desc: Paste the suspicious message or upload a screenshot
about.flow_step2_desc: The AI analyzes the content and returns a verdict in 30 seconds
about.flow_step3_desc: If it's fraud, fill out a pre-populated official complaint
about.flow_step4_desc: Send the warning to family and friends on WhatsApp

report_form.toggle_subtitle: Criminal complaint, police petition, DNSC report, bank notification
report_form.privacy_notice: Your data stays on your device.
report_form.privacy_notice_body: None of the fields below are sent to the server. Reports are generated locally, in the browser.
report_form.complete_note: Fill in the fields marked with [COMPLETE] before submission. Print or copy the text.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: ai-grija.ro is a free civic tool for detecting fraud and phishing attempts. Protecting your personal data is an absolute priority for us.
privacy.s2_highlight: We do not collect personal data.
privacy.s2_li2: Personal data in the analyzed text is automatically masked before transmission
privacy.s2_li3: We do not store messages submitted for verification
privacy.s2_li4: We do not collect IP addresses in an identifiable manner
privacy.s2_li5: We do not use analytics systems with personal data
privacy.s2_li6: Screenshots uploaded for analysis are stored temporarily (maximum 30 days) on Cloudflare R2 for abuse prevention, then automatically deleted
privacy.s2_li7: We do not use cookies — neither tracking, functional, nor session
privacy.s2_li8: We do not use localStorage or sessionStorage for personal data
privacy.s2_li9: IP addresses are used exclusively for rate limiting and are not stored permanently
privacy.s3_body: Before the text is sent for analysis, our system automatically applies client-side filtering (in your browser) that masks:
privacy.s3_li6: Screenshots are analyzed by the Llava AI model (Cloudflare Workers AI) and stored temporarily on Cloudflare R2 (maximum 30 days) for abuse prevention. After the retention period they are automatically deleted.
privacy.s3_li7: Data is processed exclusively on Cloudflare infrastructure (participant in the EU-US Data Privacy Framework)
privacy.s3_note: This operation occurs exclusively on your device, before any transmission to our servers.
privacy.s4_body: We do not sell or share data with third parties. Data is processed exclusively through Cloudflare (Workers AI, R2, KV) and Umami services. Cloudflare is a participant in the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. Umami does not receive personal data.
privacy.s5_body:
ai-grija.ro does not use cookies of any kind — not tracking, advertising, session, or functional. We do not use localStorage or sessionStorage for personal data. The only information stored locally is the language preference (selected by the user), which is not personal in nature.

To understand general platform usage, we use Umami (umami.is), a privacy-respecting web analytics service. Umami does not set cookies, does not collect personal data, does not store IP addresses and does not track users across visits. Aggregated data (number of visitors, pages viewed) does not allow individual identification.
privacy.s6_body: Since we do not collect identifiable personal data, there is no data to delete, export or rectify. If you have privacy-related questions, you can contact us at:
privacy.s7_body: We reserve the right to update this policy. Any changes will be published on this page with the update date.
privacy.s8_body: If you subscribe to alerts via Telegram or WhatsApp, we store your identifier (Telegram chat_id or WhatsApp phone number) exclusively for the purpose of sending security notifications.
privacy.s8_li2: Data stored in Cloudflare KV (EU infrastructure)
privacy.s8_li3: Telegram: send the /sterge command to delete your data
privacy.s8_li4: WhatsApp: send the message STERGE to delete your data
privacy.s8_li5: We do not share this data with third parties
privacy.s9_body: If you subscribe to the ai-grija.ro newsletter, your email address is processed by Buttondown (buttondown.email), a GDPR-compliant provider with a DPA available.
privacy.s9_li1: Double opt-in required — address is confirmed before activation
privacy.s9_li2: Every email contains a functional unsubscribe link
privacy.s9_li4: We do not share your email address with third parties
privacy.s10_li1: Messaging subscriber data: deleted after 12 months of inactivity
privacy.s10_li2: Consent records: retained 5 years as legal proof
privacy.s10_li4: Web analytics (Umami, self-hosted): managed via Cloudflare Zaraz with consent; anonymous aggregated data only
privacy.s11_body: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.s11_li1: Access — request a copy of the data we hold about you
privacy.s11_li3: Erasure — request deletion of your data
privacy.s11_li4: Portability — receive your data in a structured format
privacy.s11_li5: Objection — object to the processing of your data
privacy.s11_anspdcp: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the ANSPDCP (Romanian Data Protection Authority): www.dataprotection.ro

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1_body: By using the ai-grija.ro platform, you fully accept these terms of use. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.s2_body: ai-grija.ro is a free civic tool, without commercial purpose, intended to inform the public about online fraud attempts in Romania. The service is provided "as is", without any guarantee of continuous availability or absolute accuracy.
terms.s3_body: The results provided by the AI system are strictly indicative. They do not constitute legal, financial or cybersecurity advice. The user is solely responsible for decisions made based on this information. We recommend consulting competent authorities (DNSC, Romanian Police, your bank) for situations with financial or personal impact.
terms.s4_intro: The service may be used for:
terms.s4_li2: Educating and informing others about online fraud
terms.s5_li1: Automated use (scraping/bot) without written consent from the team
terms.s5_li2: Testing the system with personal data of third parties without their consent
terms.s5_li3: Any use for illegal or fraudulent purposes
terms.s6_body: The ai-grija.ro team cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect loss resulting from the use or inability to use the service, including decisions made based on the AI analyses provided.
terms.s7_body: The platform's source code is open-source (MIT license). Editorial content (texts, campaign descriptions) is the property of the ai-grija.ro team / Zen Labs.
terms.s8_body: For any questions related to these terms:
